---
title: "orbital + Snowflake"
subtitle: "Animated explainers for scoring models inside Snowflake"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: css/index.css
---

These RevealJS decks contrast two ways of scoring a trained [tidymodels](https://www.tidymodels.org/) (R) or [scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/) (Python) model against data living in Snowflake:

- **the "before" (round-trip)** — the data is sent to a live session, scored through the workflow, and the predictions come back; and
- **the orbital way (in place)** — [orbital](https://orbital.tidymodels.org/) compiles the model to SQL that runs *inside* Snowflake, so there is no round-trip and no live runtime.

Each deck comes in a **Posit** framing (the session runs inside Snowflake via the Posit Team Native App) and a **vertical** (portrait) layout, in both **R** and **Python** — 16 decks in all. Use the arrow keys to step through the stages.

## Both, in one flow

Step through the round-trip ("before"), then continue with an arrow into the orbital way ("after") in a single deck.

| | session beside Snowflake | session inside Snowflake (Posit) |
|---|---|---|
| **R · tidymodels** | [horizontal](orbital-combined.html) · [vertical](orbital-combined-vertical.html) | [horizontal](posit-combined.html) · [vertical](posit-combined-vertical.html) |
| **Python · scikit-learn** | [horizontal](python-orbital-combined.html) · [vertical](python-orbital-combined-vertical.html) | [horizontal](python-posit-combined.html) · [vertical](python-posit-combined-vertical.html) |

## R · tidymodels

| | round-trip (the "before") | orbital (in place) |
|---|---|---|
| **session beside Snowflake** | [horizontal](orbital-roundtrip.html) <small>(<a href="assets/orbital-roundtrip.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/orbital-roundtrip.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](orbital-roundtrip-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/orbital-roundtrip-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/orbital-roundtrip-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> | [horizontal](orbital-inplace.html) <small>(<a href="assets/orbital-inplace.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/orbital-inplace.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](orbital-inplace-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/orbital-inplace-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/orbital-inplace-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> |
| **session inside Snowflake (Posit)** | [horizontal](posit-roundtrip.html) <small>(<a href="assets/posit-roundtrip.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/posit-roundtrip.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](posit-roundtrip-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/posit-roundtrip-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/posit-roundtrip-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> | [horizontal](posit-inplace.html) <small>(<a href="assets/posit-inplace.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/posit-inplace.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](posit-inplace-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/posit-inplace-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/posit-inplace-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> |

## Python · scikit-learn

| | round-trip (the "before") | orbital (in place) |
|---|---|---|
| **session beside Snowflake** | [horizontal](python-orbital-roundtrip.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-orbital-roundtrip.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-orbital-roundtrip.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](python-orbital-roundtrip-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-orbital-roundtrip-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-orbital-roundtrip-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> | [horizontal](python-orbital-inplace.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-orbital-inplace.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-orbital-inplace.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](python-orbital-inplace-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-orbital-inplace-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-orbital-inplace-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> |
| **session inside Snowflake (Posit)** | [horizontal](python-posit-roundtrip.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-posit-roundtrip.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-posit-roundtrip.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](python-posit-roundtrip-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-posit-roundtrip-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-posit-roundtrip-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> | [horizontal](python-posit-inplace.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-posit-inplace.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-posit-inplace.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> · [vertical](python-posit-inplace-vertical.html) <small>(<a href="assets/python-posit-inplace-vertical.gif" download>gif</a> · <a href="assets/python-posit-inplace-vertical.mp4" download>mp4</a>)</small> |

---

Built with Quarto RevealJS + [anime.js](https://animejs.com/), following the [tidy-animations](https://github.com/EmilHvitfeldt/tidy-animations) framework. See [orbital](https://orbital.tidymodels.org/) for the real package.
